title: Kimco Realty® Publishes 2022 Corporate Responsibility Report
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers and a growing portfolio of mixed-use assets, has published its 2022 Corporate Responsibility Report. The report highlights the company's progress in addressing environmental, social, and governance (ESG) topics, which have been a focus for Kimco and its stakeholders for over a decade. “We remain dedicated to our focus on ESG, acknow.

title: Kimco Realty: 6% Yielding Debt Is More Interesting Than 5.5% Yielding Preferred Equity
text: Kimco Realty focuses on grocery-anchored commercial real estate. The preferred dividends are safe, but why would you settle for equity when the debt is safer and offers higher returns? The 2045 bonds have a yield to maturity of in excess of 6%.

title: 2 Stocks to Buy With Dividends Yielding More Than 3%
text: Realty Income is a highly defensive retail REIT. Kimco Realty benefits from high-growth markets.

title: Kimco Realty Corporation: Small Shop Risk Appears Manageable
text: A recent bank study projects 50,000 retail stores will close over the next five years, with small stores most at risk. Small shop leases provide 46% of Kimco Realty's annual revenue. We assess the risk to Kimco Realty, and conclude the risk is manageable.

title: Should You Retain Kimco (KIM) Stock in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Kimco's (KIM) focus on grocery-anchored centers, mixed-use assets and a solid balance sheet augur well for long-term growth. However, surging e-commerce adoption and high interest rates are concerns.

title: Kimco Realty® Management to Present at Nareit's REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM) announced today that its management will participate in the Nareit's REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference on Tuesday, June 6, 2023 in New York. Management will provide a general overview of the company followed by a question and answer session. The webcast information is as follows: Event: Kimco Realty® Management Presentation at Nareit's REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference When: Tuesday, June 6, 2023 from 11:00 AM – 11:30 AM, ET Live Webca.
